name: 0G (Zero Gravity) Aristotle Mainnet
description: Blockchain platform positioning itself as 'the blockchain for AI agents.' Offers verified compute, persistent memory, and onchain settlement for autonomous AI agents. Mainnet launched September 2025.
capabilities: Settlement and payment for agent-to-agent transactions
notes: Positioning for 'trillion-dollar agentic AI economy.' Mainnet live since September 2025. Targeting autonomous agent transactions, memory, and settlement. Early-stage for direct agent integration.
